text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
First, let's go meet some of the
Umamusume you'll be working with!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume you're able to train in a
Career playthrough are known as Trainee
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Please be aware that if you haven't added
an Umamusume to your Trainee
Umamusume roster, you won't be able to
train her in a Career playthrough.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You can meet new potential trainees by
scouting them!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Well then, let's try our luck in the Pretty
Derby Scout!
